name: osint_web
summary: Alen Tadevosyan is an Armenian national born and raised in Yerevan who relocated to Madrid, Spain to study at IE University (Bachelor in Philosophy, Politics, Law & Economics, Segovia and Madrid campuses). He served as Co-President of SOAR Madrid (Society for Orphaned Armenian Relief) and interned as a Research Analyst at Arcano Partners. Post-graduation he worked as Global Strategy Manager at Revolut (Madrid) and is now Founder/CEO of Vexor (AI + Web3 Identity), based in Madrid/Remote, also participating in the Project Europe startup accelerator programme.

facts.claim: Born and raised in Yerevan, Armenia; fluent in English, Russian, Armenian, and Spanish
Supported by the IE Foundation scholarship/support during his university studies
